location: Looted from Thiollier's corpse near the Gate of Divinity Site of Grace, inside the final boss arena in Enir-Ilim — it appears only after defeating Radahn, Consort of Miquella, and only if the St. Trina/Thiollier questline was completed (his golden summon sign must have been present outside the fog gate; you don't have to actually call him in).

source.name: Thiollier (post-questline corpse, appears after the final boss)

tactics: Finish the multi-step St. Trina/Thiollier questline before burning the Sealing Tree at the Church of the Bud — that event is a point of no return that can lock the quest out
Find St. Trina at the bottom of Stone Coffin Fissure (entrance at the southern tip of Cerulean Coast), then report back to Thiollier at Pillar Path Cross
Check for Thiollier's gold summon sign outside the final boss fog gate (up the stairs from Divine Gate Front Staircase) before you commit to the fight
After defeating the final boss, rest at the Gate of Divinity grace inside the arena — Thiollier's body and full armor set appear nearby for looting
lore: A concealed needle favored by poisoners for its subtlety, it doesn't kill outright but secretes something that drags its victim into an unending sleep — fitting for Thiollier, whose quiet, clinical research into St. Trina's nectar mirrors the weapon's own hidden, drawn-out cruelty.

builds.name: Dex/Int sleep burst
builds.why: C-scaling Dexterity and D-scaling Intelligence carry a flat 42 Sleep buildup regardless of upgrade level, and its unique Sleep Evermore skill deals bonus damage to already-sleeping targets

builds.name: Offhand proc tool
builds.why: Its weapon skill is weighted to trigger from the offhand similar to a parry, letting it ride alongside a main-hand weapon purely for the sleep proc
